texto: Even in the running away from hurting, there is hurting. In opening unprotected to the experiencethat is enslaving you with its torment,there is the willingness to be free.Are you willing? Or do yo just want to wait until the world finally gets it and does it your way?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gangaji que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Even in the running away from hurting, there is hurting. In opening unprotected to the experience…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, hurt, hurting, com foco em reflexao.

texto: There is nothing more potent than thought. Deed follows word and word follows thought. And where the thought is mighty and pure, the result is mighty and pure.
explicacao: Citação de Gangaji sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is nothing more potent than thought. Deed follows word and word follows thought. And where …” articula reflexao, deeds, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como power e thought.
